leadText: Intrepid Sword (Japanese: ふとうのけん Unbending Sword) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Zacian.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.2 Generation IX 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Intrepid Sword raises the Attack stat of the Pokémon with this Ability by one stage when it enters the battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Intrepid Sword only activates once per battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Intrepid Sword has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Intrepid Sword raises the Attack stat of the Pokémon with this Ability by one stage when it enters the battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Intrepid Sword only activates once per battle.
